name: Linear Client
description: Read Linear Issues and Projects via the GraphQL API. Exposes check, get-issue, and get-project subcommands. The agent never sees the API key. Read-only in v1 — write operations ship with the push-acs-to-linear follow-on.

input.arguments: a subcommand and its arguments (e.g., get-issue ENG-123 or get-project <uuid>)

output.layout: JSON to stdout by default; --output writes to a file in the chosen --format
